top_signals.title: Ukraine creates ‘long-range’ command to step up strikes on Russia
top_signals.summary: Kyiv's campaign against Russian energy and logistics has forced Moscow to ban diesel exports and restrict shipping near the Sea of Azov.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what’s next for the Clarity Act as Congress returns to Washington
top_signals.summary: Congress returns to Washington next week, ready to take up cryptocurrency legislation before the midterm election calendar takes over.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Maritime Technologies Forum Publishes Guidelines for Methanol as Marine Fuel
top_signals.summary: The Maritime Technologies Forum (MTF) announced the publication of new guidelines to support companies in developing new Safety Management Systems (SMS) and strengthening existing SMS for ships using methanol as fuel. As the maritime industry accelerates its decarbonization efforts…
